description: This theme captures the surprise participants felt when data showed political views to be more moderate than anticipated.
quotes: The responses were less extreme than I thought
I felt surprised that a majority of democrats have less extreme thoughts than I originally thought.
I was surprised at how moderate the data showed democrats to be
which aligns with my general understanding of their political behavior
There were a lot more moderate responses than I anticipated.
responses were slightly lower or more moderate than I anticipated
I was somewhat surprised as I felt that some of the data would be more skewed toward hard-right values.
I knew that the numbers would not be very extreme.
The results were broadly consistent with existing polling knowledge
I'm surprised that the percentages rarely change,
Neutral laws can have partisan impacts
I feel lthe data showed Republicans were less antagonistic towards Democrats than anticipated.
about the fact that republicans thought that approval rating for Trump was high
and surprised by the lower ratings of how Republicans feel about Democrats.
perception of close-mindedness
people do now want fanatical change in the country
lack of change in Republican's feeling in the trend data
I was not surprised by the results because it was my expectation
I thought they were all more crazy
based on typical political attitudes and prior surveys.

theme: Surprise at Shocking Support for Trump
description: This theme highlights the astonishment regarding the persistent and unexpectedly high approval ratings for Trump and Republican policies.
quotes: I honestly expected Trump's approval to have declined more than it did
A little surprised of the low trend that approves of Trump but it was higher than expected
the high average approval rating Republicans gave to the state of the economy
I think I was most surprised at the approval rate of DJT.
I was most shocked about the economy.
steadiness of the President's approval rates
Approval rates for Trump were much higher than I expected
I am especially not surprised that Trump has such high approval ratings
I couldn't believe how many Republicans still approve of Trump
I am just shocked that his approval ratings are still in the 80s with his supporters.

description: This theme captures the mixed feelings of skepticism and confirmation bias when participants evaluated the data against their expectations.
quotes: I was surprised the answers were not closer to what i predicted
I was skeptical of the low numbers
im honestly surprised at the results and do believe them to be flawed and inaccurate.
I'm kinda of skeptical.
I don't believe the numbers.
some of the views I didn't expect to be supported at such a low rate whereas it favors them. (the democrats)
some of the things they don't agree with were lower than I thought but still seemed sort of high
surprised because I was not expecting the responses to be that close to 'No support'
I felt surprised because I thought more of them would favor things that would negatively affect the Republicans
The most surprising data was the one with the question asking how strong republicans would support hindering democrats from winning elections.

description: This theme encompasses the unexpected findings regarding support for violence as a political strategy, contrary to participants' anticipations.
quotes: I was surprised by the amount of support for violence to advance Democrat political goals
surprised about using guess at supporting violence to advance goals
They act like they want to set the world on fire to get rid of people who don't believe what they do.
it's a loud fringe group that supports violence, etc.
surprised regarding how many Democrats supported violence
I expected a little more violence and/or hostility
respondents don;t consider bomning iranian girls and shooting brown people as real violence
Many of the things is was surprised to see, such as wanting a fair election and not to use violence
The numbers were lower for supporting violence and policies against democrats than I expected
I was surprised to see how many republicans actually support violence.

description: This theme reflects how media narratives and preconceived perceptions influenced expectations, leading to unexpected findings that challenged initial beliefs about partisan behaviors and attitudes.
quotes: Based on popular news, I expected quite the opposite results.
I thought some of the lower results would be much higher
The results were shocking because on my social media feeds I am constantly seeing examples of Republicans supporting political violence
I felt surprised because I follow politics and this data didn't seem right
The media just makes us think that all democrats are unreasonable.
storylines we're presented in media suggest Republicans have more difference than me on issues than the polling would suggest.
this possibly shows the role that media plays in politics
aware of the high levels of political polarization.
mainstream and social media cheerleading implying a much higher response to support violence
I thought more far left respondents would swing the data to the left
because so much of the footage online and on the news shows that
The news always portrays the worst of the worst.
when you remove the main stream media shouting about the extreme positions
media influence on people's perception of others regardless of actual data.
how media portrays issues does not align with people's actual views.

description: This theme explores the discrepancies between predictions and real findings, highlighting instances where respondents misjudged the political landscape.
quotes: A lot of my guesses were off a lot
The answers did not seem accurate
This mismatch was surprising,
I guessed so wrong
Average estimates did not align with outcomes.
The findings were not the same,
well my expectations were wrong
big surprise was in data outcomes being different
accuracy was off on first few predictions
expectations were misaligned,
thought it would have been more
opposite result
always thought otherwise
findings showed otherwise
didn't track with expectations
supprised with inconsistency in finding
prediction didn't align with data
my guess was too low/high
differnt from prediction
opposite from thoughts
